name: Nature
tagline: Command the elements: air, earth, fire, water, metal, and plant.

baseAbility.name: Geomancing
baseAbility.description: You choose one elemental package (air, earth, fire, water, plant, or the non-core metal package) the moment you gain this sphere, unlocking that package's geomancing abilities (e.g. earth grants Tremor/Bury, fire grants Create Fire/Affect Fire, water grants Wave, air grants Gust of Wind/Create Air). Each geomancing ability is a standard action within close range, using the natural material tied to its package; effects generally last while you concentrate, or 1 SP more for 1 min/CL.

talents.name: Expanded Geomancing
talents.description: Gain an additional elemental package you don't already have. Repeatable.

talents.name: Tremor (earth)
talents.description: Earth package ability: shake the ground in an area, knocking creatures prone on a failed save.

talents.name: Bury (earth)
talents.description: Earth package ability: entangle or immobilize a creature standing on suitable ground.

talents.name: Wave (water)
talents.description: Water package ability: create a wave that knocks creatures back and can extinguish fire.

talents.name: Gust of Wind (air)
talents.description: Air package ability: a line or cone of wind that can push back creatures and disperse gases/fog.

talents.name: Affect Fire (fire)
talents.description: Fire package ability: manipulate existing fire's size, shape, or intensity, or create it outright.

talents.name: Whirlwind (geomancing)
talents.description: New geomancing ability: create a sustained damaging vortex in your chosen element.

talents.name: Stoneskin (spirit)
talents.description: A (spirit) talent: grant yourself or a touched ally a deflection/armor bonus while concentrating on an earth geomancing ability.

talents.name: Elemental Resilience (spirit)
talents.description: A (spirit) talent: gain energy resistance tied to your element, with a chance to heal from matching damage.

talents.name: Ranged Geomancing
talents.description: Increase the range of your geomancing abilities by one step. Repeatable.
